name: Swoopa: Marketplace Alerts for Private Party Car Deals
snippet: Swoopa's AI-powered valuations instantly show you what a vehicle is likely worth , factoring in model, mileage, condition, and market context.

name: Swoopa Dealers - App Store
snippet:
Dealers use Swoopa to track private-party vehicles in their area, compare pricing , and make faster decisions with less manual searching.
